CODIGO: CREATE VIEW [DBO].[VW_ALERTA_WEB] AS        SELECT DISTINCT   M06.M06_CD_VIEW                   AS CD_ALERTA,   M06.M06_NM_VIEW                   AS NM_ALERTA,   U.NM_EMAIL                        AS NM_EMAIL,   C.IN_INTERNO                      AS IN_INTERNO,    M06_CD_MENU                       AS CD_MENU,   ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_DOM, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_DOM,   ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEG, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_SEG,     ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TER, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_TER,   ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUA, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_QUA,   ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUI, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_QUI,    ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEX, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_SEX,   ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SAB, '0')  AS FREQ_OCORRE_SAB,   ISNULL(M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TODOS, '0')AS FREQ_OCORRE_TODOS,    ISNULL(M06_DIAS_FREQ_OCORRE,'')   AS DIAS_FREQ_OCORRE,   M19.M19_HR_ALERTA                 AS HR_ALERTA,   CONVERT(CHAR(5), GETDATE(), 108)  AS HR_ATUAL,   M19.M19_DT_ULTIMA_EXEC            AS DT_ULT_EXEC,   M19.M19_NR_ALERTA                 AS NR_ALERTA,    M06_TP_LIMITADOR                  AS TP_LIMITADOR,   M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX              AS TP_LIMITADOR_AUX,   M06_TP_LIMITADOR_2                AS TP_LIMITADOR_2,   M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX_2            AS TP_LIMITADOR_AUX_2  FROM M06_VIEW                 M06 (NOLOCK)     INNER JOIN M19_VIEW_HORARIO  M19 (NOLOCK) ON M19.M19_CD_VIEW = M06.M06_CD_VIEW     INNER JOIN TUSUARIO          U   (NOLOCK) ON U.CD_USUARIO    = M06.M06_CD_USUARIO     INNER JOIN BROKER.DBO.TCARGO C   (NOLOCK) ON C.CD_CARGO      = U.CD_CARGO    WHERE M06_CD_SUBM = '03'      AND M06_HR_FREQ_DIARIA IS NOT NULL

CREATE VIEW dbo.VW_DEFINICAO_TABELA  AS  SELECT     TB.name AS NM_TABELA, CL.name AS NM_COLUNA, UPPER(TP.name) + CASE CL.IS_ANSI_PADDED WHEN 1 THEN '(' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,                         CL.MAX_LENGTH) + ')' ELSE CASE WHEN CL.PRECISION IN (0, TP.PRECISION) THEN '' ELSE CASE WHEN CL.SCALE IN (0, TP.SCALE)                         THEN '(' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, CL.PRECISION) + ')' ELSE '(' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, CL.PRECISION) + ',' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, CL.SCALE)                         + ')' END END END AS DS_TIPO  FROM         sys.columns AS CL INNER JOIN                        sys.tables AS TB ON TB.object_id = CL.object_id INNER JOIN                        sys.types AS TP ON TP.user_type_id = CL.user_type_id

CREATE VIEW VW_DI_RETIFICADA AS    -- antigamente ele checava se tinha multa lançada no faturamento  --SELECT NR_PROCESSO,   --CASE  --WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFATURAMENTO_CC (NOLOCK)  --       WHERE NR_PROCESSO = P.NR_PROCESSO  --         AND CD_ITEM IN ('023', '074', '075', '720')  --         AND ISNULL(IN_RESTITUI, '0') = '0')  --      -  --     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFATURAMENTO_CC (NOLOCK)  --       WHERE NR_PROCESSO = P.NR_PROCESSO  --         AND CD_ITEM IN ('023', '074', '075', '720')  --         AND ISNULL(IN_RESTITUI, '0') = '1') > 0    --  THEN (CASE ISNULL(P.NR_DI, '')  --         WHEN '' THEN '0'  --         ELSE '1'  --       END)  --  ELSE '0'  --END AS QTDE  --FROM TPROCESSO P (NOLOCK)    -- agora ele checa se tem registros na nova tela de retificações de DI, na Manutenção do Processo  SELECT NR_PROCESSO,                 CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BROKER.DBO.TRETIFICA_DI (NOLOCK)                                         WHERE NR_PROCESSO = P.NR_PROCESSO ) > 0 THEN '1'                          ELSE '0'                  END AS QTDE  FROM TPROCESSO P (NOLOCK)

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[VW_MES] AS    SELECT 1  AS NR_MES, 'Janeiro' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 2  AS NR_MES, 'Fevereiro' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 3  AS NR_MES, 'Março' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 4  AS NR_MES, 'Abril' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 5  AS NR_MES, 'Maio' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 6  AS NR_MES, 'Junho' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 7  AS NR_MES, 'Julho' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 8  AS NR_MES, 'Agosto' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 9  AS NR_MES, 'Setembro' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 10 AS NR_MES, 'Outubro' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 11 AS NR_MES, 'Novembro' AS NM_MES UNION  SELECT 12 AS NR_MES, 'Dezembro' AS NM_MES

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[VW_SERVICO_GERAL] AS      SELECT CD_SERVICO, NM_SERVICO, CD_CLASSIFICACAO, CD_VIA_TRANSPORTE, NR_DIAS_CONCLUSAO, CD_EVENTO_CONCLUSOR,             CD_EV_INI, CD_EV_FIM, CD_GRUPO, IN_LI, 0 AS IN_NOVO_SERVICO      FROM TSERVICO (NOLOCK)      UNION ALL      SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, CD_SERVICO) AS CD_SERVICO, NM_SERVICO, CD_CLASSIFICACAO, CD_VIA_TRANSPORTE, NR_DIAS_CONCLUSAO, CD_EVENTO_CONCLUSOR,             CD_EV_INI, CD_EV_FIM, CD_GRUPO, IN_LI, 1 AS IN_NOVO_SERVICO      FROM TSERVICO_NOVO (NOLOCK)

CREATE VIEW VW_ULTIMA_ETAPA AS    SELECT F.NR_PROCESSO, E.NM_ETAPA, F.CD_FOLLOWUP_ETAPA  FROM TFOLLOWUP_ETAPA F (NOLOCK)    INNER JOIN (SELECT NR_PROCESSO, MAX(CD_FOLLOWUP_ETAPA) AS CD_FOLLOWUP_ETAPA                FROM TFOLLOWUP_ETAPA (NOLOCK) GROUP BY NR_PROCESSO) U ON (U.NR_PROCESSO = F.NR_PROCESSO AND U.CD_FOLLOWUP_ETAPA = F.CD_FOLLOWUP_ETAPA)    INNER JOIN TETAPA E (NOLOCK) ON (E.CD_ETAPA = F.CD_ETAPA)

CREATE VIEW [dbo].[VW_ULTIMA_ETAPA_ITEM] AS    SELECT F.NR_PROCESSO, F.NR_ITEM, E.NM_ETAPA, F.CD_FLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA, F.CD_EMPRESA  FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA F (NOLOCK)    INNER JOIN (SELECT NR_PROCESSO, NR_ITEM, MAX(CD_FLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA) AS CD_FLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA                FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA (NOLOCK) GROUP BY NR_PROCESSO, NR_ITEM) U ON (U.NR_PROCESSO = F.NR_PROCESSO AND U.NR_ITEM = F.NR_ITEM AND U.CD_FLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA = F.CD_FLP_PO_ITEM_ETAPA)    INNER JOIN TETAPA E (NOLOCK) ON (E.CD_ETAPA = F.CD_ETAPA)
